character.bio: A contractor for a PMC, Luke uses his elite military background to teach mixed martial arts. His days off are spent eating junk food, playing video games, and fighting, but make no mistake—Luke plays to win.

luke_st_lp.note: * 3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

luke_st_mk.note: * 3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

luke_st_hp.note: * Recovery is reduced by 1 frames when blocked

luke_st_hk.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponentForces a juggle state when the attack lands as a Punish Counter.Feet are Invincible from frame 8 to frame 15.

luke_cr_mp.note: * 3 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

luke_cr_hp.note: Forces the opponent into a standing positionThis move can be canceled until the 1st active frame.

luke_cr_hk.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

luke_j_mp.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

luke_j_hp.note: Forces a slam knockdown on counter or Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent

luke_rawhide.note: Forces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent

luke_outlaw_kick.note: 17 frames of advantage added when the attack lands as a Punish Counter.Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

luke_double_impact_1.note: * 4 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

luke_double_impact_2.note: When the 1st attack of Double Impact hits as a Punish Counter, the 2nd hit is considered a grounded attack if the opponent is standing on the ground. Combo scaling changes from 20% to 10% in this situation.

luke_fatal_shot.input: (After an OD Sand Blast) P + P
luke_fatal_shot.note: Consumes 10000 of the Drive gauge on activation.

luke_flash_knuckle_l.input: (Hold the button to change effect) ↓↙← + LP
luke_flash_knuckle_l.note: Hold the button for more than 18 frames to change propertiesPerform the Perfect version by releasing the button between frames 18 - 20Can be canceled into a special move or Super Art on the 40th frame when the attack hits

luke_flash_knuckle_l_charged.note: Clashes with projectiles (Once)Combo scaling added to 2nd hit.

luke_flash_knuckle_l_perfect.note: Clashes with projectiles (Once)Combo scaling added to 2nd hit.

luke_flash_knuckle_m.input: (Hold the button to change effect) ↓↙← + MP
luke_flash_knuckle_m.note: Hold the button for more than 18 frames to change propertiesPerform the Perfect version by releasing the button between frames 18 - 20

luke_flash_knuckle_m_charged.note: Clashes with projectiles (Once)Combo scaling added to 2nd hit.

luke_flash_knuckle_h.input: (Hold the button to change effect) ↓↙← + HP
luke_flash_knuckle_h.note: Hold the button for more than 18 frames to change propertiesPerform the Perfect version by releasing the button between frames 18 - 20

luke_flash_knuckle_od.input: (Hold the button to change effect) ↓↙← + P
luke_flash_knuckle_od.note: Transitions to 2nd attack on hitCan only be canceled into DDT on the 1st hit

luke_ddt.input: (After an OD Flash Knuckle) P + P
luke_ddt.note: Consumes 10000 of the Drive gauge on activation.

luke_aerial_flash_knuckle.context: (During a vertical or forward jump) (Hold the button to change effect)
luke_aerial_flash_knuckle.input: (During a vertical or forward jump) (Hold the button to change effect) ↓↙← + P
luke_aerial_flash_knuckle.note: *+7 frames of recovery added when whiffing the attack high in the air.

luke_aerial_flash_knuckle_charged.level: (During a neutral or forward jump)  Hold

luke_aerial_flash_knuckle_od.context: (During a vertical or forward jump) (Hold the button to change effect)
luke_aerial_flash_knuckle_od.input: (During a vertical or forward jump) (Hold the button to change effect) ↓↙← + P

luke_avenger.note: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 13 - 31

luke_avenger_od.note: Super Armor for 1 attack from frames 3 - 35Can transition to branching attacks from frames 12 - 31

luke_impaler.note: 5 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

luke_rising_uppercut_l.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14Considered airborne from frames 8 - 36* Does 800 individual damage from the 3rd active frame and on

luke_rising_uppercut_m.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 8Considered airborne from frames 9 - 39* Does 800 individual damage from the 3rd active frame and on

luke_rising_uppercut_h.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9Considered airborne from frames 11 - 43* Does 800 individual damage from the 3rd active frame and on

luke_rising_uppercut_od.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 10Considered airborne from frames 8 - 50Can only transition to Slam Dunk on hit

luke_slam_dunk.input: (After an OD Rising Uppercut) P + P
luke_slam_dunk.note: Consumes 10000 of the Drive gauge on activation.

luke_sa1.note: Invincible to strikes and throws from frames 1 - 6Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

luke_sa2.note: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 7Transitions to full attack after the 2nd hitMinimum guaranteed damage is 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

luke_sa3.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
luke_sa3.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K
luke_sa3.note: Start up changes depending on the distance from the opponentWhen activated from close rangeStart up is 10 frames, and completely invincible from frames 1 - 13When activated from furthest possible rangeStart up is 27 frames, and completely invincible from frames 1 - 13Minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

luke_ca.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
luke_ca.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↘→↓↘→ + K
luke_ca.note: Start up changes depending on the distance from the opponentWhen activated from close rangeStart up is 10 frames, and completely invincible from frames 1 - 13When activated from furthest possible rangeStart up is 27 frames, and completely invincible from frames 1 - 13Minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

luke_throw_f.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

luke_throw_b.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

luke_back_dash.note: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

luke_drive_impact.note: Super Armor for 2 hits from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallProperties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, or after the Super Armor absorbs a hit:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

luke_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
luke_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
luke_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible from frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

luke_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

luke_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
luke_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
luke_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

luke_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

luke_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

luke_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

luke_cancel_drive_rush.level: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move)  (  )  MM
luke_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
luke_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
